authoringIntent: Repository-authored procedural product-form benchmark; no external image was used as reconstruction evidence.
allowedClaims: The authored brief defines intended dimensions, semantic parts, material zones, motion, and performance invariants.
Source and unit validation may prove implementation conformance to the authored brief.
Deterministic source tests may establish the declared cavity-overlap, identity-continuity, material-response, and authoring-input contracts without constituting visual acceptance.

visualAcceptance.reason: No reference image, browser comparison sheet, or AI-vision acceptance record exists.
